# gcore_dns_network_mapping (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "gcore_dns_network_mapping" "example_dns_network_mapping" {
  id = 0
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
- `mapping` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--mapping))
- `name` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--mapping"></a>
### Nested Schema for `mapping`

Read-Only:

- `cidr4` (List of String)
- `cidr6` (List of String)
- `tags` (List of String)
